Display for flyers or leaflets
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes Display --x=80 --h=120 --radius=10 --angle=0 --thickness=3.0 --burn=0.1 --format=svg --labels=0 --labels=1 --reference=100.0 --tabs=0.0 --qr_code=0 --inner_corners=loop --spacing=0.5 --debug=0 Command line short: boxes Display --x=80 --h=120 --radius=10 --spacing=0.5 Url: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/Display?x=80&h=120&radius=10&angle=0&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=0.5&debug=0&language=en&render=2 Url short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/Display?x=80&h=120&radius=10&spacing=0.5 SettingsUrl: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/Display?x=80&h=120&radius=10&angle=0&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=0.5&debug=0&language=en&render=2 SettingsUrl short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/Display?x=80&h=120&radius=10&spacing=0.5
